About Me
A curious mind bridging economic theory and digital craft — from Bihar to the web.

I'm Samrat Sagar Pushkar, a master's student in Economic Studies and Policy at the Central University of South Bihar, Gaya. Currently interning at IT Patna, where I research monetary policy transmission mechanisms.

Beyond academics, I'm building a freelance career in content writing, online tutoring, and web development — turning evenings into opportunities. I believe great work happens at the intersection of analysis and aesthetics.

📍 Danapur Cantonment, Patna – 801503, Bihar, India · Open to remote collaborations worldwide.
